technique_summary: Competent intermediate-level performance with smooth loop deployment and placement. Total time of 72 seconds falls within intermediate range (40-90s). Good bilateral instrument coordination throughout.
strengths: Good instrument coordination between both hands
improvement_suggestions: Could potentially reduce time in cinching phase to approach expert benchmarks
Practice to achieve sub-60 second completion times for expert level performance
